revision.comment: Improved grammar, removed redundant part and added part about moving template
revision.text:
{{ mbox | image = [[File:AWB logo draft.svg|44x50px|alt=|link=]] | text = This template is used by the standard installation of [[Wikipedia:AutoWikiBrowser|AutoWikiBrowser]] (AWB). If you are planning to make any major changes to this template, move it, or nominate it for deletion, please notify AWB's users and maintainers beforehand at [[Wikipedia talk:AutoWikiBrowser|Wikipedia talk:AWB]] as a courtesy.{{#if:{{{1|}}}|

{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by AutoWikiBrowser|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: The GFDL license on the image requires a link to the file description page for attribution and notice of license. See [[MOS:PDI]] for more info.
revision.text:

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=AWB_standard_installation here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
